Garfield: The Movie (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,367,693Details
International Box Office $132,726,857
Worldwide Box Office $208,094,550
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,727,611 (28.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,094 opening theaters/3,150 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $145,152,600

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 11th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox, released as Garfield The Movie
International Releases: September 16th, 2004 (Wide), released as Garfield (Australia)
Video Release: October 19th, 2004 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Garfield The Movie
MPA Rating: PG for brief mild language
Running Time: 80 minutes
Franchise: Garfield
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Live Action Remake
Plot point: Comic Strip, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Davis Entertainment, Twentieth Century Fox
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
